Mortise Lock

SARGENT 8271

SKU: LC 8271

Quote Required

SARGENT 8271 Electrical Fail Secure function mortise lock, less cylinder

Request Quote Call (831) 555-0100
Authorized ASSA ABLOY Distributor
Expert Installation Available
Direct Vendor Pricing

Product Details

• 71 function — Power ON, unlocks outside lever 

• Specify voltage: 12VDC or 24VDC (operates from 12-24VDC) 

• Key outside retracts latchbolt • Lever outside retracts latchbolt, except when locked 

• Lever outside can only be locked electronically 

• Lever inside always retracts latchbolt 

• Auxiliary deadlatch
